sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Sticky Key Like Backdoor Usage - Registry
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the usage and installation of a backdoor that uses an option to register a malicious debugger for built-in tools that are accessible in the login screen
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), @twjackomo, Jonhnathan Ribeiro, oscd.community

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects a Windows program executable started from a suspicious folder
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems), Patrick Bareiss, Anton Kutepov, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the modification of the registry to disable a system restore on the computer
Detects Windows executables that write files with suspicious extensions

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Outbound Network Connection To Public IP Via Winlogon
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects a "winlogon.exe" process that initiate network communications with public IP addresses
Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detect set EnableFirewall to 0 to disable the Windows firewall
A General detection for files being created in the Windows startup directory. This could be an indicator of persistence.
Detects registry modifications that disable internal tools or functions in explorer (malware like Agent Tesla uses this technique)
Detects when an attacker tries to disable User Account Control (UAC) by setting the registry value "EnableLUA" to 0.

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Disable Internal Tools or Feature in Registry
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects registry modifications that change features of internal Windows tools (malware like Agent Tesla uses this technique)
Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects modifications to the "Hidden" and "ShowSuperHidden" explorer registry values in order to disable showing of hidden files and system files.
This technique is abused by several malware families to hide their files from normal users.

Detects when an attacker tries to disable User Account Control (UAC) notification by tampering with the "UACDisableNotify" value.
UAC is a critical security feature in Windows that prevents unauthorized changes to the operating system. It prompts the user for permission or an administrator password before allowing actions that could affect the system's operation or change settings that affect other users.
When "UACDisableNotify" is set to 1, UAC prompts are suppressed.
Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Files With System Process Name In Unsuspected Locations
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description:
Detects the creation of an executable with a system process name in folders other than the system ones (System32, SysWOW64, etc.).
It is highly recommended to perform an initial baseline before using this rule in production.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Sander Wiebing, Tim Shelton, Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Registry Modification to Hidden File Extension
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Hides the file extension through modification of the registry
Detect suspicious parent processes of well-known Windows processes

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: MALWARE-CNC User-Agent known malicious user-agent string - Win.Trojan.VBInject
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET $HTTP_PORTS ( msg:"MALWARE-CNC User-Agent known malicious user-agent string - Win.Trojan.VBInject"; flow:to_server,established; http_header; content:"User-Agent|3A| |AA DF F6 F4|",fast_pattern,nocase; metadata:impact_flag red; service:http; reference:url,www.virustotal.com/en/file/B37DB43DCE25BB3A681EE4F79392795C0D54F6260A3C34FC2008E210CCFE6DAE/analysis/; classtype:trojan-activity; sid:40216; rev:3; )
alert ( gid:119; sid:228; rev:2; msg:"(http_inspect) server response before client request"; metadata: rule-type preproc; classtype:unknown;)
alert ( gid:119; sid:279; rev:1; msg:"(http_inspect) invalid status line"; metadata: rule-type preproc; classtype:unknown;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: (stream_tcp) data sent on stream after TCP reset sent
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert ( gid:129; sid:8; rev:2; msg:"(stream_tcp) data sent on stream after TCP reset sent"; metadata: policy max-detect-ips drop, rule-type preproc; classtype:protocol-command-decode;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: ET INFO URL Shortener Service Domain in DNS Lookup (tiny .cc)
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET INFO URL Shortener Service Domain in DNS Lookup (tiny .cc)"; dns.query; content:"tiny.cc"; nocase; endswith; classtype:misc-activity; sid:2027199; rev:5; metadata:created_at 2019_04_15, tag URL_Shortener_Service, updated_at 2023_04_28;)

alert dns $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ET DNS Query for .cc TLD"; dns.query; content:".cc"; endswith; fast_pattern; classtype:bad-unknown; sid:2027758; rev:5; metadata:affected_product Any, attack_target Client_Endpoint, created_at 2019_07_26, deployment Perimeter, signature_severity Minor, updated_at 2020_09_17;)
alert http any any -> any any (msg:"FILE tracking GIF (1x1 pixel)"; filemagic:"GIF image data, version 89a, 1 x 1|00|"; sid:21; rev:1;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: SURICATA HTTP unable to match response to request
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert http any any -> any any (msg:"SURICATA HTTP unable to match response to request"; flow:established,to_client; app-layer-event:http.unable_to_match_response_to_request; flowint:http.anomaly.count,+,1; classtype:protocol-command-decode; sid:2221010; rev:1;)

crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_msg: INDICATOR-COMPROMISE png file attachment without matching file magic
crowdsourced_ids_results.rule_raw: alert tcp $EXTERNAL_NET $HTTP_PORTS -> $HOME_NET any ( msg:"INDICATOR-COMPROMISE png file attachment without matching file magic"; flow:to_client,established; http_header; content:"Content-Type: image/png"; pkt_data; content:!"|0D 0A 89|PNG"; metadata:policy max-detect-ips drop; service:http; classtype:misc-activity; sid:44416; rev:3; )
